titleStmt.title: SII 8.577: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 577. (A.R. No. 269 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vanaccakkaravatti konerinmaikoṇṭāṉ Irājaga
mbhīra vaḷanāṭṭut tirukkuḷirmaṇiyāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanallūr
keraḷāṉtakap peruṉteruvu Uṭ(p)paṭṭa nilattum kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻa
nallūrāna cempiyaṉkiḷiñallūr nilattum nattamākak koṇṭu Eṟṟukiṟa vi
yāpārikaḷukku taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyum kuṭiiruppu nattamumākap peṟum paṉṟūr
kiḻavaṉ kulottuṅkacoḻa vicaiyapālaṉ palarpakkalum Iṉṉāṭṭil vi
laikoṇṭa tirukkuḷirmaṇiyāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻanallūrt tirukkuḷirmaṇi mā
tevaṟkku Uḷḷūṟ(k)kaḷ tiṟappum kaliyukarampainallūrum Uṭppaṭa nilam A
ṟupattoṉpate Aṟumāvaraiyiṉkiḻk kālum kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉallū
rāṉa cempiyan kiḷiñallūr nilam Irupattaiñcaraiye Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaik kiḻ
araiyum taccakkuṭi nilam nāṟpate mukkāle Iraṇṭumāviṉ kiḻeṭṭumā mukkā
ṇi muntirikaiyum perur nilam Aṟupattiraṇṭe Irumāvaraiyiṉ kiḻoṉpatumā
mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟueḻe mukkāle
mākāṇik kiḻaraiye mummāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum muṉṉuṭai yārum pa
ḻamperuma tavirntu Irupattunālāvatumutal � koṇṭacoḻanallūr
Eṉṉum peyarāl Orurāka kūṭṭavum Iṉṉilattut tirukkuḷirmaṇiyāna jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻanallūr keraḷāntakap perunteru Uṭpaṭṭa nila
ṇṭacoḻanallūrāna cempiyaṉ kiḷiñallūr nilattum taṅkaḷukkuk ka
I nattamākap patiṟṟuveli nilamum mattā tittaṉeṉṉum
kuḷamuṅ karaiyumāka muveli nila ka nikkavum
tta nikki tntavi
vatu Aḷavil niṅkalāṉa Ūrṉattam nikki nikkiniṉṟa ni
lam puṉcey nilattile nikkavum nikkiniṉṟa Ūrkaḷil Ūrnattamum
Ūruṇikkuḷamum Uḷḷiṭṭu Aḷavil niṅkalāṉa nilattu Iṟaikaṭ
ṭukkuṭalākkik koḷḷalānnilam Iṟaikaṭṭuk kuṭalākki koḷḷavum I
ṉṉilam Uṭppaṭṭa nilattu niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilam nikki nikkiniṉṟa nila
ttukkuk kaṭamai Iṟukkumiṭattu muṉpu mutal koṇṭuvarukiṟapaṭi tavira
k kār maṟuvu Orupūvum kamukuṅ koṭiyum Uḷḷiṭṭuc ceyyalām payiṟ
ceytu viḷainilattukku Irupattumuvāirakkala nellum puṉpayiruk
ku nāṉūṟu kācum maṉaiiṟai Āiraṅ kācum Irupattuṉālāva
tumutal taṇṭi mutalāya Ikkācilum nellilum pattaiñcāl vaṉta kācu miru
pattuṉālāl vaṉta nellilum kācilum nikkiniṉṟa kācum nellum pacāna
ttilum Iṟukkavum Ivvūruṭaṉ kūṭṭiṉa cempiyan kiḷiñallūr nilam Iru
pattaiñcaraiye Araikkāṇi muṉtirikai kiḻaraiyum perumpaṉṟūr kiḻavaṉ ku
lottuṅkacoḻa vicaiyapālaṉukkuk kāṇiyākavum nikkiniṉṟa nilam to
ṇṭaimāṉ niccayittapaṭiye taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyākavum Ivvūrile Ivvū
rt tirukkuḷirmaṇimātevaṟkku Ayveli nilamum tiruccomiśvara muṭai
yāṟkku veli nilamum tirumeṟkoyi lāḻvāṟkku Arai veliyum Ulakamuṇṭa
rāḻvārkku Arai nilamum tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭavum kaṭavatā
kappeṟaveṇu menṟum toṇṭaimān namakkuc conṉa
Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac col
kku varikku kūṟuceyvārkaḷukkum �
IṉṉilamThe record is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 8.577 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
